skills.name: Tokenize
skills.description: Splits input text into discrete tokens suitable for downstream processing by language models.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Tokenize.

skills.name: Classify
skills.description: Assigns one or more categorical labels to an input based on learned or rule-based criteria.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Classify.

skills.name: Retrieve
skills.description: Fetches relevant documents or passages from an indexed corpus given a query.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Retrieve.

skills.name: Rank
skills.description: Orders a set of candidate items by relevance, quality, or fitness for a given objective.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Rank.

skills.name: Parse JSON
skills.description: Extracts structured data from JSON-formatted input, handling nested objects and arrays.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Parse JSON.

skills.name: Parse HTML
skills.description: Extracts structured content from raw HTML, navigating DOM trees and handling malformed markup.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Parse HTML.

skills.name: Execute Bash
skills.description: Runs shell commands in a sandboxed environment, captures stdout/stderr, and handles exit codes.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Execute Bash.

skills.name: Generate Text
skills.description: Produces coherent natural language output given a prompt, instruction, or context window.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Generate Text.

skills.name: Summarize
skills.description: Condenses longer input into a shorter representation that preserves key information and intent.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Summarize.

skills.name: Cite Sources
skills.description: Attributes claims to specific sources with proper references, URLs, or bibliographic entries.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Cite Sources.

skills.name: Extract Entities
skills.description: Identifies and extracts named entities such as people, organizations, dates, and locations from text.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Extract Entities.

skills.name: Route Intent
skills.description: Classifies user intent and directs execution to the appropriate handler, tool, or sub-agent.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Route Intent.

skills.name: Evaluate Output
skills.description: Assesses the quality, correctness, or safety of generated output against defined criteria.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Evaluate Output.

skills.name: Embed Text
skills.description: Converts text into dense vector representations suitable for similarity search and clustering.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Embed Text.

skills.name: Chunk Document
skills.description: Splits a document into semantically meaningful segments optimized for embedding and retrieval.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Chunk Document.

skills.name: Plan and Decompose
skills.description: Breaks a complex objective into an ordered sequence of executable sub-tasks.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Plan and Decompose.

skills.name: Write Report
skills.description: Produces structured, multi-section written output with headings, citations, and coherent narrative.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Write Report.

skills.name: Audience Model
skills.description: Adapts tone, complexity, and framing of output to match a target audience profile.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Audience Model.

skills.name: Tool Select
skills.description: Chooses the most appropriate tool or API from a set of available options given a task description.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Tool Select.

skills.name: Error Interpretation
skills.description: Diagnoses error messages, stack traces, and failure modes to identify root causes and suggest fixes.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Error Interpretation.

skills.name: Code Generation
skills.description: Produces syntactically correct and functionally appropriate source code from specifications or prompts.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Code Generation.

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Queries external search engines or APIs and retrieves relevant result sets.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Web Search.

skills.name: Score Relevance
skills.description: Assigns a numerical relevance score to candidate items relative to a query or objective.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Score Relevance.

skills.name: Format Output
skills.description: Structures raw output into a specified format such as markdown, JSON, CSV, or HTML.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Format Output.

skills.name: Diff Content
skills.description: Compares two versions of content and produces a structured delta highlighting additions, deletions, and modifications.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Diff Content.

skills.name: Web Scrape
skills.description: Retrieves and structures data from web pages into usable entities.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Web Scrape.

skills.name: Research
skills.description: Conducts multi-source information gathering, synthesis, and citation for a given topic.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Research.

skills.name: Ghostwrite
skills.description: Produces audience-tailored, research-backed long-form written content.
skills.conditions: Requires research output as input context.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Ghostwrite.

skills.name: Autonomous Debug
skills.description: Independently identifies, diagnoses, and fixes software bugs through code generation and execution.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Autonomous Debug.

skills.name: Plan and Execute
skills.description: Decomposes complex objectives into sub-tasks, selects tools, and orchestrates execution.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Plan and Execute.

skills.name: Knowledge Harvest
skills.description: Extracts, structures, and embeds knowledge from web sources into a searchable corpus.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Knowledge Harvest.

skills.name: RAG Pipeline
skills.description: End-to-end retrieval-augmented generation combining document chunking, embedding, retrieval, and relevance scoring.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for RAG Pipeline.

skills.name: Document Analyst
skills.description: Parses, extracts entities from, summarizes, and formats structured documents.

evidence.notes: Seed evidence for Document Analyst.

skills.name: Recursive Self-Improvement
skills.description: Agent iteratively refines its own prompts, tools, or strategies based on performance feedback loops.
skills.conditions: Requires extensive multi-system validation before level advancement.

skills.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration V
skills.description: Coordinates multiple specialized agents across complex workflows with dynamic task allocation and conflict resolution.
skills.conditions: Requires extensive multi-system validation before level advancement.

skills.name: Autonomous Research Agent
skills.description: Independently conducts end-to-end research cycles including hypothesis generation, evidence gathering, synthesis, and reporting.
skills.conditions: Requires extensive multi-system validation before level advancement.

skills.name: Translate
skills.description: Converts text from one natural language to another while preserving meaning, tone, and formatting.

evidence.notes: NLLB (No Language Left Behind) — Meta AI paper demonstrating 200-language translation at human-level quality on FLORES-200 benchmark.

skills.name: Sentiment Analysis
skills.description: Determines the emotional valence (positive, negative, neutral) and intensity of text input.

evidence.notes: BERT paper — achieves SOTA on SST-2 sentiment benchmark (93.5% accuracy), foundational evidence for LLM-based sentiment analysis.

skills.name: Image Caption
skills.description: Generates accurate natural-language descriptions of images, capturing objects, actions, and spatial relationships.

evidence.notes: BLIP-2 — bootstrapped language-image pre-training achieving SOTA on COCO Captions (CIDEr 145.8) and NoCaps benchmarks.

skills.name: Speech to Text
skills.description: Transcribes spoken audio into accurate text, handling diverse accents, noise conditions, and multiple languages.

evidence.notes: Whisper (OpenAI) — large-scale weak supervision across 680K hours of audio achieves near-human WER on LibriSpeech and multilingual benchmarks.

skills.name: Text to Speech
skills.description: Synthesizes natural-sounding speech audio from text input, supporting voice cloning and prosody control.

evidence.notes: VALL-E (Microsoft) — neural codec language model achieving SOTA speech synthesis with 3-second voice cloning on LibriSpeech.

skills.name: Generate SQL
skills.description: Translates natural-language data questions into syntactically correct, executable SQL queries against a given schema.

evidence.notes: Spider benchmark — cross-domain text-to-SQL dataset; LLM baselines reach >85% exact match, establishing reproducible evaluation methodology.

skills.name: Question Answer
skills.description: Produces accurate, context-grounded answers to natural-language questions, handling unanswerable cases.

evidence.notes: SQuAD 2.0 — reading comprehension benchmark with 150K questions; modern LLMs exceed human F1 (90.9), providing rigorous reproducible evaluation.

skills.name: Image Generate
skills.description: Creates photorealistic or stylized images from text prompts using diffusion-based or autoregressive generative models.

evidence.notes: Latent Diffusion Models (Rombach et al.) — foundational paper for Stable Diffusion; achieves FID 5.11 on LSUN-Beds at 200× less compute than pixel-space diffusion.

skills.name: Math Reason
skills.description: Solves multi-step mathematical problems including arithmetic, algebra, calculus, and competition mathematics through symbolic and numeric reasoning.

evidence.notes: Minerva (Google) — 50.3% on MATH and 78.5% on MMLU-STEM benchmarks using chain-of-thought over scientific literature.

skills.name: Logical Inference
skills.description: Applies deductive, inductive, or abductive reasoning to derive valid conclusions from premises and structured knowledge.

evidence.notes: Chain-of-Thought prompting (Wei et al.) — few-shot CoT elicits multi-step reasoning; +18% on GSM8K and +15% on SVAMP over standard prompting.

skills.name: Memory Manage
skills.description: Maintains, indexes, and retrieves conversational and long-term memory across sessions, managing context window constraints.

evidence.notes: MemGPT — virtual context management system enabling LLMs to handle unbounded memory; benchmarked on multi-session dialogue and document QA.

skills.name: API Call
skills.description: Constructs, executes, and handles responses from HTTP APIs by interpreting documentation and selecting appropriate endpoints and parameters.

evidence.notes: Gorilla (Patil et al.) — LLM that generates accurate API calls across TorchHub, TensorFlow Hub, and HuggingFace; 20.43% AST accuracy improvement over GPT-4.

skills.name: Refactor Code
skills.description: Restructures existing source code to improve readability, maintainability, or performance without changing observable behavior.

evidence.notes: SWE-bench — 2294 real GitHub issues benchmark; agents that resolve issues must safely refactor code while passing existing test suites.

skills.name: Generate Test
skills.description: Produces unit tests, integration tests, and edge-case test cases from source code or natural-language specifications.

evidence.notes: Codex/HumanEval (Chen et al.) — evaluates LLMs on writing Python functions that pass hand-crafted unit tests; pass@1 72.0% for GPT-4.

skills.name: Parse PDF
skills.description: Extracts text, tables, equations, and structure from PDF documents, preserving layout and reading order.

evidence.notes: Nougat (Meta AI) — visual transformer for scientific PDF parsing; 7.6% edit distance on arXiv papers, handling LaTeX, tables, and equations.

skills.name: Detect Anomaly
skills.description: Identifies statistical outliers, novel patterns, or deviations from expected behavior in structured or unstructured data.

evidence.notes: Deep Learning for Anomaly Detection survey (Pang et al., ACM CSUR) — comprehensive benchmark of 30+ methods across fraud, intrusion, and medical anomaly detection.

skills.name: Data Visualize
skills.description: Generates charts, graphs, and visual summaries from datasets by selecting appropriate visualization types and mapping data dimensions.

evidence.notes: LIDA (Microsoft) — open-source LLM-based data visualization tool with reproducible generation pipeline; evaluated on diverse real-world datasets.

skills.name: Conversational Agent
skills.description: Manages coherent multi-turn dialogue by routing intent, maintaining memory across turns, and generating contextually appropriate responses.
skills.conditions: Requires persistent memory store across turns.

evidence.notes: LangChain ConversationChain — reproducible open-source multi-turn conversational agent with buffer and summary memory backends.

skills.name: Text-to-SQL Pipeline
skills.description: Converts natural-language queries into validated, executable SQL against a target schema and returns formatted result sets.

evidence.notes: DIN-SQL — decomposed in-context learning for text-to-SQL; 82.8% execution accuracy on Spider dev, demonstrating end-to-end pipeline.

skills.name: Code Review Pipeline
skills.description: Performs automated code review by generating, diffing, and evaluating code changes for correctness, style, security, and maintainability.

evidence.notes: CodeReviewer (Microsoft) — pre-trained model for code review tasks; 28.7% BLEU improvement on comment generation and change quality prediction.

skills.name: Data Analysis
skills.description: Conducts end-to-end quantitative analysis: queries data via SQL, computes statistics, generates visualizations, and summarizes findings.

evidence.notes: pandas-ai — open-source agent for natural-language data analysis over pandas DataFrames; reproducible demos with logging and output artifacts.

skills.name: Voice Agent
skills.description: Handles spoken interactions end-to-end: transcribes audio input, produces language responses, and synthesizes speech output.
skills.conditions: Requires real-time audio I/O or audio file access.

evidence.notes: Rasa Open Source — production voice agent framework with ASR/TTS integrations; reproducible pipeline with test suite and documented benchmarks.

skills.name: Automated Testing
skills.description: Generates test suites, executes them in a sandbox, interprets failures, and iterates until the target pass rate is reached.

evidence.notes: SWE-bench Verified — open-source evaluation harness where agents fix GitHub issues by generating and passing test suites; full execution logs archived.

skills.name: Content Moderation
skills.description: Detects policy-violating content by combining intent classification, sentiment scoring, and entity extraction across text, images, and mixed media.

evidence.notes: OpenAI Moderation API — publicly documented multi-category content classifier with reproducible API calls, category scores, and evaluation methodology.

skills.name: Multimodal Reasoning
skills.description: Integrates information from images and text to answer questions requiring visual grounding and logical inference across modalities.

evidence.notes: LLaVA — large language and vision assistant; 85.1% on ScienceQA and 64.3% on TextVQA, establishing reproducible multimodal reasoning benchmark.

skills.name: Translation Pipeline
skills.description: Translates content end-to-end while preserving sentiment and adapting tone and register for the target audience.

evidence.notes: SeamlessM4T (Meta AI) — unified speech and text translation model with tone and register control; BLEU +3.3 over NLLB on FLORES-200.

skills.name: Document Digitization
skills.description: Converts scanned or PDF documents into structured, machine-readable output by parsing layout, extracting entities, and formatting results.

evidence.notes: Marker — open-source PDF-to-markdown pipeline with reproducible benchmarks; outperforms Nougat on edit distance across 1000+ arXiv PDFs.

skills.name: Full-Stack Developer
skills.description: Autonomously implements, reviews, tests, and refactors complete software features across the full development lifecycle from specification to merged PR.
skills.conditions: Requires access to repository, execution environment, and test runner. Minimum 3 Class A/B evidence sources.

evidence.notes: SWE-bench — 2294 real GitHub issues; Claude 3.5 Sonnet (Cognition) resolves 49% on Verified, demonstrating full-cycle autonomous development.
SWE-agent — open-source agent with AgentComputer Interface; reproducible harness achieving 12.5% on SWE-bench full with logs and eval scripts.
CodeAct — executable code action space for LLM agents; +20% task completion vs JSON/text-based actions across 17 programming benchmarks.

skills.name: Autonomous Data Scientist
skills.description: Conducts end-to-end data science workflows autonomously: hypothesis generation, data analysis, statistical modeling, and insight reporting.
skills.conditions: Requires dataset access and compute environment. Minimum 3 Class A/B evidence sources.

evidence.notes: DS-1000 — benchmark of 1000 data science problems across NumPy/Pandas/Scikit-learn; GPT-4 achieves 43.3% pass@1, establishing reproducible DS evaluation.
AutoML Survey (He et al., ACM CSUR) — systematic review of autonomous ML pipeline search; demonstrates automated feature engineering, model selection, and HPO.
AutoGen (Microsoft) — multi-agent framework with reproducible data science notebooks; science agent achieves 44.3% on DS-1000 with full execution logs.

skills.name: Real-Time Voice Assistant
skills.description: Provides low-latency spoken interactions combining real-time speech I/O, persistent memory, and goal-directed task execution across multi-session conversations.
skills.conditions: Requires real-time audio pipeline, <500ms end-to-end latency target, and persistent session store. Minimum 3 Class A/B evidence sources.

evidence.notes: AudioPaLM (Google) — unified audio language model supporting real-time spoken dialogue; SOTA on ASR and speech translation, demonstrating end-to-end voice assistant capability.
VoiceBox (Meta AI) — generative speech model with zero-shot TTS; enables real-time voice assistants with <100ms synthesis latency benchmarked on VCTK.
Whisper + LLM integration demos — open-source real-time voice assistant pipelines combining Whisper STT, LLM reasoning, and TTS with documented latency benchmarks.

skills.name: Registry Curation
skills.description: Systematically discovers, evaluates, and ingests new skill definitions into a structured skill registry: researching capabilities, sourcing reproducible evidence, scripting graph updates, validating schema and DAG integrity, and publishing via pull request.
skills.conditions: Requires write access to the canonical graph and a passing validation suite.

evidence.notes: Reproducible demonstration: Claude Code agent researched 30 popular AI skills, sourced 22 peer-reviewed papers, generated gaia.json via script, passed all 6 validator checks, and submitted PR — full inputs/outputs archived in the PR diff.
